title: Senior Teacher - British Council India - Attractive Package

jsonLd.title: Senior Teacher - British Council India - Attractive Package
jsonLd.description:
Join the British Council India family as a Senior Teacher in Noida. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About British Council India:
British Council India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in Special Education

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Referral bonus program
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Noida, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with British Council India!
